Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CRAIG S. MILLER OF THE WEISBERG & MILLER, TEL. NO. 296-7070 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEVAN J. HENRIOULLE, TEL. NO. (510) 835-3730 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.


RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ARDEN INTENGAN'S Motion For The Court To Issue Either Of The Following Alt Order; Alt 1) To Impose Terminating Sanctions Against Defendants Benjamin And Maria Agnes Sison For Failure To Comply With Discovery Alt 2) To Deem 2nd Set Of Admissions Admitted Etc - GRANTED IN PART. Defendant must provide responses to form interrogatories and requests for production within 10 days until September 6, 2011. The requests for admission are deemed admitted unless defendant provides C.C.P. compliant responses by the time of the hearing. The request for monetary sanctions is denied because plaintiff has not supported the request with appropriate evidence. The requests for other sanctions are denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported =301/PJB

Off Calendar Jul-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ARDEN INTENGAN'S Motion For The Court To Order Terminating Sanctions Against Defts Benjamin And Maria Agnes Sison For Failure To Comply With Two Discovery Orders Of The Court IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANTS AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES ARE STRICKEN, DEFENDANTS MAY NOT INTRODUCE OR RELY ON ANY FACTS, WITNESSES OR DOCUMENTS NOT ALREADY IDENTIFIED IN THE 5/17/11 DISCOVERY RESPONSES, DEFENDANTS MAY NOT ARGUE THAT ANYONE VIOLATED ANY STATUTE, ORDINANCE OR REGULATION, AND DEFENDANTS MAY NOT ARGUE OR INTRODUCE EVIDENCE TO SUGGEST ANY AGREEMENTS OTHER THAN THOSE IDENTIFIED IN RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORY 50.1 (A) OR THAT THOSE AGREEMENTS HAVE BEEN MODIFIED OR BREACHED OR ARE AMBIGUOUS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. (301/PJB)
